childhood.familyBackground: Co-founder of Rollins Inc., built pest control empire from regional company to national leader.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: Rollins Inc. 공동 창립자, 지역 회사를 전국적 리더로 성장시킨 해충 방제 제국 건설
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in Atlanta with entrepreneurial spirit. Early exposure to family pest control business shaped acumen.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 기업가 정신을 가지고 애틀란타에서 성장. 가족 해충 방제 사업 노출이 능력을 형성

careerTimeline.event: Began career in family pest control business
careerTimeline.eventKo: 가족 해충 방제 사업에서 경력 시작

careerTimeline.event: Expanded through strategic acquisitions and consolidation
Became chairman and CEO of Rollins Inc.
careerTimeline.eventKo: Rollins Inc.의 회장 및 최고경영자가 됨

careerTimeline.event: Expanded into termite and wildlife removal services
careerTimeline.eventKo: 흰개미 및 야생동물 제거 서비스로 확장

failures.description: Market faced challenges from environmental regulations
failures.descriptionKo: 시장이 환경 규제로 인한 어려움 직면

quotes.text: Quality service and customer satisfaction drive long-term growth
quotes.textKo: 품질 서비스와 고객 만족이 장기 성장을 주도한다

recommended.title: The Lean Startup
recommended.author: Eric Ries
recommended.note: Influences business strategy and innovation approach
recommended.noteKo: 비즈니스 전략 및 혁신 접근에 영향

personalTraits.knownFor: Building largest pest control company in North America
personalTraits.knownForKo: 북미 최대 해충 방제 회사 구축
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports education and healthcare in Georgia
